title: axonopus corymbosus
intro: Axonopus corymbosus, also known as the finger grass or finger grassy grass, is a type of perennial grass found in tropical regions, particularly in Central and South America. The plant has been studied for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Axonopus corymbosus include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Axonopus corymbosus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
